summary: Phase 9 — Brain Everywhere fully validated. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests pass (page-context injection for country/product, recommendations + ctas, role personalization for importer, multilingual language echo, and regression on /api/brain/ask, /api/brain/search, /api/admin/brain/overview, /api/countries, /api/services, /api/duty-calc, /api/admin/login, caching). Frontend: Brain widget FAB visible on /countries/uae, /products/agarbatti, /services/iec-registration, and / (home) above the WhatsApp button; correctly hidden on /brain and /admin-cms. Page-context headers correct (COUNTRY, PRODUCT, SERVICE, DEFAULT) with matching suggested prompts (brain-widget-suggest-0..2). UAE country page returned a UAE-specific live AI answer (1138 chars) with engine pills and CTA buttons. CTA navigation works — 'Create Free Account' routed to /contact and closed the panel. Input + send wiring works. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: router.py orchestrate() is solid — page entity injection is idempotent and only triggers when KB entry exists.
ROLE_BOOST list is appended after capping engines to 6; final cap to 7 leaves 1 slot for role boost which is reasonable.
_recommendations iterates 8 kinds with kb_search each call — consider parallelizing with asyncio.gather if KB grows beyond current 79 entries (perf, not correctness).
Cache key correctly includes language+role+page_context+question — prevents cross-context leakage.
BrainWidget.jsx is clean (~180 lines), uses data-testids consistently, derivePage covers all routes from PROMPTS map.
test_credentials: Admin token leadnation-admin-2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Live AI active via OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini through Emergent key.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing KB entries (uae, agarbatti, iec-registration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 Brain Everywhere is verified. The widget FAB lives at bottom-right above the WhatsApp button on every public page and is hidden on /brain and /admin*. All 13 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase9_brain_everywhere.py pass in ~16s (live AI + caching).
